privileged_info_summary: The food.gdt dataset contains real data from Principles of Econometrics (POE5) with 40 household observations. OLS regression of food_exp on income yields: intercept 83.4160, slope 10.2096, R-squared 0.3850. The Jarque-Bera normality test on residuals produces statistic 0.0633 and p-value 0.9688, indicating residuals are normally distributed. Metadata claims intercept 83.4 and slope 10.2 are verified (rounded), R-squared 0.385 is verified, and JB p-value range [0.0, 1.0] is verified. However, the jb_stat_min value of 0.0 is contradicted by the actual JB statistic of 0.0633.
